name: Carolina Data Warehouse for Health (CDWH)
description: Enterprise clinical data warehouse containing structured and unstructured records from UNC Health, including EHR data, lab results, imaging metadata, and administrative records.

name: NC AHEC Network Data
description: Statewide network of regional health education centers serving primarily rural and underserved populations across approximately 80 NC counties.

name: UNC Lineberger Cancer Registry
description: Hospital-based cancer registry capturing diagnosis, treatment, and outcomes data for patients seen at UNC Lineberger.

name: UNC Biospecimen Processing Facility
description: Centralized biorepository for research-grade tissue, blood, and biofluid samples supporting translational research.

name: UNC Sheps Center Rural Health Research Data
description: Research datasets and analyses produced by the Cecil G. Sheps Center for Health Services Research, including the NC Rural Health Research Program.
held_by: Cecil G. Sheps Center for Health Services Research
